qualification.details: For Medical Candidates (all posts): | A medical/dental qualification included in Schedule I, II, or Part II of the third schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956 Postgraduate qualification: MD / MS / MDS or equivalent in the respective discipline DM (Medical super-specialties) or MCh (Surgical super-specialties) - 2/3/5-year recognized course | For Non-Medical Candidates (applicable to Anatomy, Biochemistry, Physiology, Pharmacology only): | Master's Degree in the discipline/allied subject Doctorate degree from a recognized university in the concerned discipline | Experience - Post-wise: | Note: 1 year experience relaxation for SC/ST candidates as per DoPT rules. | Note: No age relaxation available to SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS candidates applying for Unreserved (UR) vacancies.

salary_details.details: *NPA (Non-Practising Allowance) applicable for medically qualified candidates only. After 3 years, Assistant Professors move to Level 13 (Basic ₹1,23,100).

selection_process: Application Scrutiny: All online applications are received and scrutinised by the Selection Committee of AIIMS Rajkot. Only eligible candidates are called for the next stage. Shortlisting: If the vacancy-to-candidate ratio exceeds 1:10
the Selection Committee may shortlist on the basis of an objective screening score (Appendix 1 criteria). Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must produce original academic

and registration certificates before the interview. Personal Interview: Eligible candidates appear before the Standing Selection Committee at AIIMS Rajkot in person. Candidates must make a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation on their work and achievements. Final Selection: The decision of the Competent Authority regarding selection is final and binding.
Note: Interview dates will be communicated via the official AIIMS Rajkot website and email only.

_labels.apply_online: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Apply Online 2026 - Link Active

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: AIIMS Rajkot is a Central Autonomous Body (CAB) established under an Act of Parliament, functioning under the Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY) division of the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India. The Faculty Recruitment 2026 aims to fill Group-A posts on Direct Recruitment basis, failing which on Deputation basis. All vacancies earmarked for SC, ST, and OBC are backlog vacancies except the post of Professor in Community and Family Medicine. The last date to apply online is 10th July 2026 .

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Notification 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The official AIIMS Rajkot Faculty notification gives a complete picture of the recruitment timeline from application to selection.

rows.details: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rajkot
Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Notification 2026 PDF Download
content_sections.text: Candidates must download the official AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification PDF to check complete post-wise vacancy distribution, qualification details, and general conditions. The application link is live at the Google Form portal and the payment link is active at the eshiksa portal. AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF – Click Here to Download Application Start Date: 11th June 2026 Last Date to Apply: 10th July 2026 (17:00 Hours) Application Link: https://forms.gle/Jdyh3D27f4y9ymJWA Payment Link: https://erp.eshiksa.net/DirectFeesv3/AIIMSRajkotRecruitment AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Apply Online 2026 - Link Active Steps to Apply Online: Visit the official AIIMS Rajkot website at www.aiimsrajkot.edu.in or directly open the Google Form application link. Fill in personal details, post applied for, department, and recruitment mode (Direct/Deputation/Contract). Enter educational qualification details including MBBS, MD/MS/DM/MCh/Ph.D., year of passing, and university. Upload photograph and signature in clear JPEG format as per prescribed guidelines. Pay the application fee online via the payment link. Retain payment receipt. Email a scanned signed copy of the application format (Annexure-VI) along with Brief of the Candidate (Annexure-II) to [email protected] . Candidates applying for deputation must route their application through their present employer along with ACRs/APARs for the last 5 years and Vigilance Clearance Certificate. Note: Application fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Payment must be made online only.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Vacancy 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 86 vacancies have been released under AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 across four designations and multiple departments. Category-wise breakup: Professor - 26 (SC-4, ST-2, OBC-7, EWS-1, UR-12); Additional Professor - 17 (SC-3, ST-1, OBC-6, EWS-1, UR-6); Associate Professor - 15 (SC-4, ST-2, OBC-5, EWS-1, UR-3); Assistant Professor - 28 (SC-8, ST-2, OBC-10, EWS-0, UR-8). Note: Vacancies are provisional and subject to variation. 4% horizontal reservation for PwBD is applicable.

content_sections.heading: What is the AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Eligibility Criteria 2026?
content_sections.text: For Medical Candidates (all posts): A medical/dental qualification included in Schedule I, II, or Part II of the third schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956 Postgraduate qualification: MD / MS / MDS or equivalent in the respective discipline DM (Medical super-specialties) or MCh (Surgical super-specialties) - 2/3/5-year recognized course For Non-Medical Candidates (applicable to Anatomy, Biochemistry, Physiology, Pharmacology only): Master's Degree in the discipline/allied subject Doctorate degree from a recognized university in the concerned discipline Experience - Post-wise: Note: 1 year experience relaxation for SC/ST candidates as per DoPT rules. Note: No age relaxation available to SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS candidates applying for Unreserved (UR) vacancies.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Application Scrutiny: All online applications are received and scrutinised by the Selection Committee of AIIMS Rajkot. Only eligible candidates are called for the next stage. Shortlisting: If the vacancy-to-candidate ratio exceeds 1:10, the Selection Committee may shortlist on the basis of an objective screening score (Appendix 1 criteria). Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must produce original academic, experience, category, and registration certificates before the interview. Personal Interview: Eligible candidates appear before the Standing Selection Committee at AIIMS Rajkot in person. Candidates must make a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation on their work and achievements. Final Selection: The decision of the Competent Authority regarding selection is final and binding. Note: Interview dates will be communicated via the official AIIMS Rajkot website and email only.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: *NPA (Non-Practising Allowance) applicable for medically qualified candidates only. After 3 years, Assistant Professors move to Level 13 (Basic ₹1,23,100).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 10th July 2026 by 17:00 Hours. The application must be submitted via the Google Form link and the signed copy emailed to [email protected].

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 87 vacancies have been released across four posts - Professor (26), Additional Professor (17), Associate Professor (15), and Assistant Professor (28) — spanning 37 departments. All SC, ST, and OBC vacancies except one are backlog vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General and OBC candidates must pay Rs. 500. EWS candidates also pay Rs. 500. SC, ST, and PwBD candidates are fully exempted. Candidates applying on deputation basis are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Selection is through application scrutiny, shortlisting (if applicants exceed 1:10 ratio), document verification, and a personal interview before the Standing Selection Committee at AIIMS Rajkot. Candidates must deliver a 5-minute PowerPoint presentation at the interview.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates currently employed in government service apply?
faq.answer: Yes. Government employees must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer at the time of interview. Deputation candidates must route their application through their employer along with ACRs/APARs for the last 5 years and a Vigilance Clearance Certificate.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 10th July 2026 by 17:00 Hours. The application must be submitted via the Google Form link and the signed copy emailed to facultyrecruitmentaiimsrajkot@gmail.com.
